text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today I'm conducting time trials with Silence
Suzuka to measure her progress.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
choice_data_list:
I'm looking forward to seeing how you've
improved.

I'm looking forward to seeing how you've
improved.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
My legs were tingling with each stride, and I just
couldn't stop them.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
And what used to be distant scenery seemed so
clear. It felt amazing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems my training with Silence Suzuka is
showing good results.
